name: org.machanism.machai:bindex-core
description: Bindex Core (org.machanism.machai:bindex-core) is a Java library that provides core workflows for creating/updating bindex.json files, registering them into a MongoDB-backed registry, semantically retrieving relevant Bindex documents using embeddings and vector search, and assembling deterministic LLM prompt inputs from selected Bindexes. It includes AI-assisted Bindex generation via BindexBuilder (and specialized builders for Maven, JavaScript/TypeScript/Vue, and Python) that prompt a GenAIProvider with the Bindex v2 JSON schema and project context (e.g., effective/sanitized POM + source/resources, package.json + src scan, pyproject.toml + inferred source dir), with optional incremental update from an existing bindex.json and logging of provider inputs to .machai/bindex-inputs.txt. Registry and retrieval are implemented via Picker and BindexRepository, persisting serialized Bindex JSON plus normalized classification facets and a classification embedding vector in MongoDB, executing vector search with language/layer filters and a minimum similarity threshold, selecting best versions per library, and expanding transitive dependencies. ApplicationAssembly builds and executes an ordered prompt conversation (system + assembly instructions + recommended libraries + user task) and logs provider inputs to .machai/assembly-inputs.txt. The module integrates with MongoDB (mongodb-driver-sync) and OpenAI-compatible providers (via langchain4j-open-ai) through the GenAIProvider abstraction.

usageContext: Generating and updating bindex.json for projects (Maven, JavaScript/TypeScript/Vue, Python)
Prompting a GenAI provider with schema + project context to produce schema-compliant Bindex metadata
Registering Bindex documents into MongoDB with stored JSON + classification facets + embedding vector
Embedding-based semantic retrieval using MongoDB Atlas vector search with language/layer filters and score threshold
Selecting best versions per library name and retrieving Bindexes by id
Dependency expansion for selected artifacts using transitive dependency traversal
Assembling deterministic LLM prompt inputs from selected Bindex documents and executing them via a GenAI provider
Tooling pipelines that index repositories and recommend libraries for application assembly

constructors.description: Creates an instance that can register Bindex-related function tools (get_bindex, get_bindex_schema) with a GenAIProvider. A BindexRepository is initialized when setConfigurator(org.machanism.macha.core.commons.configurator.Configurator) is called.

examples.description: Initialize the tools with configuration and register them on a provider so LLM workflows can call get_bindex and get_bindex_schema.

constructors.description: Creates an ApplicationAssembly that uses the given provider identifier and configuration, applies available function tools, sets the provider working directory, and configures the FunctionToolsLoader with the same configuration.

examples.description: Create an assembly helper and set the project directory used for writing .machai/assembly-inputs.txt.

constructors.description: Creates a BindexCreator configured to use the specified GenAI provider identifier and configuration to generate or update a project's bindex.json based on its detected ProjectLayout.

examples.description: Create a BindexCreator in update mode so existing bindex.json files are regenerated.

constructors.description: Creates a BindexRegister that reads a local bindex.json and registers it into MongoDB via Picker using the given GenAI provider identifier and configuration. If url is null, Picker constructs a default MongoDB URI.

examples.description: Create a register in overwrite mode to refresh an existing registration.

constructors.description: Creates a Picker that can register Bindexes and perform semantic retrieval against MongoDB using classification embeddings produced by the configured GenAIProvider. If uri is null, it constructs a default MongoDB Atlas URI using BINDEX_REG_PASSWORD when available.

examples.description: Create a Picker and retrieve semantically matching Bindexes for a query string.

features.name: get_bindex_schema
features.description: Function tool implementation that loads and returns the Bindex v2 JSON schema (classpath resource /schema/bindex-schema-v2.json) as a JSON string for LLM workflows.

examples.description: Expose the Bindex schema to an LLM so it can generate schema-compliant bindex.json documents.

features.name: get_bindex
features.description: Function tool implementation that retrieves a registered Bindex from MongoDB by its id via BindexRepository and returns it serialized as JSON (or the literal null if not found).

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.ai.manager.GenAIProvider provider = /* ... */;
// after tool registration, the LLM/tooling layer can call get_bindex({"id":"org.machanism.machai:bindex-core:1.0.2"})
examples.description: Fetch a specific Bindex document by id during an LLM-assisted workflow.

features.name: processFolder
features.description: Creates or updates a project's bindex.json in the project directory described by the given ProjectLayout. Selects an appropriate BindexBuilder via BindexBuilderFactory, optionally loads an existing Bindex as origin, and writes the generated Bindex to bindex.json (creating parent directories if needed).

examples.description: Generate (or overwrite) bindex.json for a project by inspecting its layout and using an AI provider to build a schema-compliant Bindex.

features.name: processFolder
features.description: Reads bindex.json from the given project directory and registers it in the MongoDB-backed registry through Picker. If update is disabled and an entry exists, it skips re-registration; otherwise it inserts (after deleting any prior document by id).

examples.description: Register a project's bindex.json if it is not already registered.

features.name: pick
features.description: Performs semantic retrieval for the given query by prompting the GenAIProvider to produce Classification objects, vector-searching MongoDB using classification embeddings with language and layer filters, enforcing a minimum similarity score threshold, selecting best versions per library name, and returning matching Bindexes (dependency expansion is supported by internal traversal).

examples.description: Run a semantic search with a relaxed minimum score threshold and retrieve matching Bindexes.

features.name: assembly
features.description: Builds a deterministic prompt conversation and executes it via the configured GenAIProvider. It sends system instructions and assembly instructions, includes a recommended libraries table derived from the selected Bindexes, appends the user task prompt, logs provider inputs to .machai/assembly-inputs.txt under the configured project directory, and executes provider.perform().

examples.description: Assemble and execute an LLM prompt using selected Bindex documents as context and log the provider inputs under .machai.

examples.name: End-to-end workflow
steps: Use BindexCreator to generate/update bindex.json for a project layout (Maven/JScript/Python).
Use BindexRegister to register the generated bindex.json into MongoDB via Picker.
Use Picker.pick(query) to retrieve relevant libraries (Bindexes) for an intent.
Use ApplicationAssembly.assembly(userPrompt, bindexes) to construct and execute an LLM prompt using the selected library metadata.
